go live steps
Go live with AI agents in minutes
With Plivo's guided setup, you can build, test, and launch production-ready agents - without code or complexity.
01
Vibe Agent
"Build me a customer support agent that handles refund requests. It should ask for the order number, look it up, and process refunds automatically..."
Analyzing your requirements...
Describe your use case
Share what you want your agent to do. Vibe understands your intent and gets to work.
02

When a customer calls
Greeting Message

Vibe connects the dots - setting up actions, triggers, and integrations automatically.

Get Started Now

build smarter
Build smarter, launch faster
Build and deploy high-performing agents without code. AI Agent connects to your tools, understands your workflows, and starts delivering results on day one.
Vibe agent builder
Just say what you want to build
Describe the use case, and Vibe Agent builds the agent instantly.
Ask to make changes anytime
Update steps, messages, or logic in Vibe Agent by simply describing what you want. No coding required.
Test and go live
Test conversations in a safe environment, fine-tune responses, and go live instantly when you're ready.

hits.title: Plivo - an opensource alternative to Twilio
Plivo (YC S12) launches scalable API platform for Voice & SMS Apps
Plivo makes it to 50 countries in 30 days, outstrips competition
SIP Trunking to Replace My Landline Phone Using Plivo
Plivo (YC S12) raises 1.75 million from Andreessen Horowitz, SV Angel, others
Why Plivo Cloud is better than Twilio
Plivo Launches Bring Your Own Carrier
Plivo Targets Big Enterprises With 'Bring Your Own Carrier' Cloud Telephony

analysis.name: Plivo
analysis.tagline: Build Voice AI Agents That Sound Human
analysis.value_proposition: A communications platform offering both no-code and API-based tools to deploy human-like voice AI agents and omnichannel messaging at scale.
analysis.ideal_customer: Developer teams and mid-market businesses that need programmable voice/SMS/WhatsApp infrastructure with AI agent capabilities, especially in customer service, healthcare, ecommerce, and fintech

features.name: voice ai agent
features.description: Deploy AI-powered voice agents for inbound/outbound calls with human-like conversation quality
features.evidence_quote: Build human-like voice AI agents. From no-code builders for teams to flexible APIs for developers

features.name: no-code agent studio
features.description: Visual drag-and-drop builder to create, test, and deploy AI agents without writing code
features.evidence_quote: No-code AI agent studio. Build, test, and deploy omni-channel AI agents in minutes. No code required.

features.name: vibe agent builder
features.description: Natural-language agent creation — describe the agent in plain English, Vibe builds the flow automatically
features.evidence_quote: Describe your use case. Share what you want your agent to do. Vibe understands your intent and gets to work.

features.name: programmable api
features.description: Full REST/SDK API access for voice, messaging, SIP trunking, verify, and AI agents
features.evidence_quote: Programmable APIs. Full API access for Voice, Messaging, SIP Trunking, Verify, and more

features.name: text-to-speech (tts)
features.description: Natural TTS voices with support for 30+ accents and languages; bring-your-own TTS option available
features.evidence_quote: Natural Text-to-Speech voices (or bring your own)

features.name: speech-to-text (stt)
features.description: Automatic speech recognition with 95%+ accuracy across accents
features.evidence_quote: Speech-to-Text with 95%+ accuracy across accents

features.name: turn detection

differentiators: <500ms voice latency with one-hop global routing
Both no-code (Vibe/Studio) and full-API paths — same platform
Bring your own LLM, ASR, or TTS without leaving the platform
Built-in AI noise cancellation included at no extra charge
Self-improving agents via auto simulations and real-time evals
MCP server integration for agent tool connectivity
Deploy one agent across voice, SMS, WhatsApp, and chat simultaneously

praised: Positioned as a lower-cost alternative to Twilio ('Why Plivo Cloud is better than Twilio')
Rapid international expansion praised — '50 countries in 30 days, outstrips competition'
Bring Your Own Carrier feature appreciated by enterprise users targeting reduced carrier lock-in
complaints: No G2 review data available in provided sources
HN discussion from early era (YC S12) suggests original positioning was purely developer/open-source — enterprise pivot may not resonate with original audience

free_tier.limits: $10 in free credits, no credit card required, no seat or time cap stated

tiers.name: Pay as you go
tiers.headline_inclusions: Usage-based: voice from $0.0055/min, SMS $0.0077, AI agent $0.030/min; no monthly base fee

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Starts at $1,000/month; volume discounts, dedicated support, SLA, data residency options

pricing.notes: Pure usage-based pricing with no named mid-tier; all voice/AI billed in 60-second intervals; dynamic volume discounts auto-apply at higher usage bands (Jan 2025 launch); recording storage free for first 90 days then $0.0004/min/month; WhatsApp service-category messages are free; channel costs (voice, SMS, WhatsApp) charged separately from AI agent usage fees
